data.description: Event data containing the affected Stripe object

recordingUrl.description: URL of call recording if available

caller.description: Phone number of the caller (same as "from")

toZip.description: Zip/postal code of the called number

calledState.description: State of the called number (same as toState)

calledCountry.description: Country of the called number (same as toCountry)

callerCity.description: City of the caller (same as fromCity)

callerState.description: State of the caller (same as fromState)

callerZip.description: Zip code of the caller (same as fromZip)

callerCountry.description: Country of the caller (same as fromCountry)
